Featured Speakers

Leaders building the intelligent software stack.

From foundation model platforms to cloud-native infrastructure, hear from builders shaping the next phase of developer experience.

AK

Aisha Khan

VP of AI Platforms · NovaCloud

Leads production AI systems for global engineering teams and agentic developer workflows.

ML

Marcus Lee

CTO · OrbitStack

Architect of multi-cloud runtime platforms used by infrastructure teams at enterprise scale.

ER

Elena Rossi

Open Source Lead · CodeFoundry

Builds sustainable maintainer programs and open ecosystems for developer tooling.

DT

Daniel Tan

Security Architect · ShieldLayer

Focuses on secure-by-default AI infrastructure, supply chain defense, and identity.

SP

Sofia Patel

Head of DevEx · LinearOps

Designs fast, calm, and measurable engineering systems for high-performance teams.

JW

Jonas Weber

Principal Engineer · VectorGrid

Works on distributed agent infrastructure, vector search, and real-time observability.

Summit Tracks

Six focused forums for serious builders.

AI

AI Engineering

Evaluation, orchestration, RAG, model ops, and production agent systems.

CN

Cloud Native

Kubernetes, platform engineering, serverless, edge, and reliability practices.

DX

DevTools

IDE experiences, CI acceleration, testing platforms, and developer productivity.

OS

Open Source

Governance, community growth, maintainer economics, and project sustainability.

SE

Security

Zero trust, AI safety operations, secrets, dependency defense, and compliance.

AG

Agent Infrastructure

Memory, tools, observability, sandboxes, workflow engines, and human review.

Registration

Reserve your seat for the future of developer platforms.

Join engineers, founders, platform teams, open source maintainers, and AI product leaders in Singapore.

FAQ

Everything teams usually ask before they book.

Who should attend Global DevFuture Summit?

Developers, AI engineers, infrastructure teams, engineering leaders, startup builders, and open source maintainers working on modern software platforms.

Will sessions be available online?

Keynotes and selected track sessions will be streamed live and published for registered attendees after the event.

Are there hands-on workshops?

Yes. Day 2 and Day 3 include technical labs for AI agents, cloud-native platforms, secure delivery, and observability.

Can companies sponsor or bring teams?

Team passes and sponsorship packages are available for platform companies, developer tool vendors, and community organizations.
